message.content:
I need to debug a PostCSS ESM/CJS interop issue in Storybook. The error is:
"The requested module '/node_modules/postcss/lib/postcss.js?v=2e34cb1e' does not provide an export named 'default'"

This is happening in a React Native web Storybook project using Vite. I need to understand:

1. Check what version of postcss is installed: look at node_modules/postcss/package.json
2. Check if postcss uses CJS or ESM exports: look at node_modules/postcss/lib/postcss.js (first 30 lines)
3. Check what's importing postcss - search for imports of postcss in the design system: grep for "from 'postcss'" or "require('postcss')" in node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app
4. Check the ThemeProvider implementation in the design system: node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/atoms/ThemeProvider (look at how it works)
5. Check if styled-components is used in the design system

Provide all findings so I can fix the Vite configuration.

content.text: I'll help you debug this PostCSS ESM/CJS interop issue. Let me search through the relevant files to understand the problem.
